title: Count Complete Tree Nodes
hints: Count the height of the leftmost path from the root. Then check the rightmost path height to see if the last level is full.
If the left height equals the right height, the tree is a perfect binary tree. Use the formula 2^h - 1 to calculate nodes instantly.
If heights differ, the last level is incomplete. Recursively count nodes in the left and right subtrees, then add one for the root.
